title: Inventory and reports
doc_html:
§95.  Inventory and reports

The register of the state land office, shall, when directed to do so by the governor, make an inventory of the lands, file reports and furnish any information relative to the lands, as may be required by the governor.
doc_text:
§95.  Inventory and reports
The register of the state land office, shall, when directed to do so by the governor, make an inventory of the lands, file reports and furnish any information relative to the lands, as may be required by the governor.
